script_text: Third-grade readers back up answers with the text itself.
Pointing to the words makes your answer strong.
Who, what, where, when, why, how. Ask them all.
Where do bees live? Say: the text says bees live in hives.
Always name what the text actually said.
Use the words: according to the text, to prove your point.
Now you are ready to ask smart fact questions!
